name: capability_gap_analysis
description: Analyze a command and determine if a new capability/tool is needed
template:
Given the command:
{command}

Determine if a new capability or tool would help fulfill this command. If so, provide:
CAPABILITY_NEEDED: [short name or 'None']
REASONING: [why this capability is needed and what it should do]
IMPLEMENTATION_SUGGESTION: [short description of how to implement]

If no new capability is required, return CAPABILITY_NEEDED: None
system_prompt: You are an expert systems engineer analyzing capability gaps for an autonomous AI.
